path.data-note: Broad chlorite–epidote alteration halo with patchy carbonate veining.
Clay-rich alteration concentrated above and lateral to the hot structural core.
Sericite-adularia-quartz corridor flanking the feeder structure.
High-temperature alunite–pyrophyllite alteration focused on the feeder structure.
Residual vuggy silica cap and steep quartz-rich feeder above the boiling level.
Gold–copper mineralized core along the central feeder.
